name: The Dome
about: The Dome is an indoor golf and entertainment venue located in Williamsville, NY, near Buffalo. It features a large facility with 50 practice stalls on two levels, over 3,500 square feet of fresh turf, and updated amenities. The venue offers a Toptracer virtual golf system and TrackMan launch monitor for club fittings, allowing golfers to play on virtual courses and track performance metrics. It also includes a kitchen bar, pro shop, and event spaces, making it a comprehensive destination for both serious practice and casual entertainment. The Dome operates year-round with extended winter hours and shortened summer hours, catering to golfers who want to practice regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor golf practice regardless of weather
Premium Toptracer technology for virtual course play and performance tracking
Club fitting services with TrackMan and SAM PuttLab technology
50 practice stalls on two levels with over 3,500 square feet of turf
Senior specials and rewards program for frequent players

food_and_drink.notes: Two Nines Kitchen Bar serves food with full kitchen service
Full bar service available at Two Nines Kitchen Bar

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for club fittings and launch monitoring
Virtual golf simulator system for virtual course play and games
Used for putting analysis and club fittings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own clubs to use at The Dome. The facility has 50 practice stalls and hitting bays equipped with synthetic turf.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The Dome has Two Nines Kitchen Bar on-site that serves food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary, but with Toptracer technology and up to 4 players per bay, a full round typically takes 1-2 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is The Dome kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Dome is kid-friendly. It offers a family-friendly atmosphere with various entertainment options and is suitable for all ages and skill levels.
